## Email Content

**From:** "Harvard Online" <harvardonline@mail.harvardonline.harvard.edu>
**Subject:** Exciting Update: Digital Health just got an AI upgrade
**Date:** Thu, 12 Mar 2026 06:35:08 -0600

### Body (preview)

Harvard Online

 



 Digital Health just got even better.



 Exciting update! Professor Shaw and the Harvard Online team have developed and added brand-new content for Digital Health focused on artificial intelligence and emerging technologies in health care.



 



 To reflect this new AI-focused content, we’ve also updated the course title from Digital Health to Digital Health: AI and Emerging Technologies in Health Care so it better captures the skills you’ll gain after completing the course.



 



 Learn more about these updates below and enroll by May 7, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET to be among the first to experience the new Digital Health: AI and Emerging Technologies in Health Care.



Enroll Now

https://click.mail.harvardonline.harvard.edu/?%3D%3D

 





Save 20% until April 30th!





Don't forget&mdash;you have until April 30th at 11:59 PM ET to use code SPRINGLEARNING20 to save 20% on select Harvard Online courses!*





Group enrollment is also available for businesses and organizations. 

https://click.mail.harvardonline.harvard.edu/?%3D%3D 

Click here  to learn more about group discount options and connect with a member our team.











 About Digital Health: AI and Emerging Technologies in Health Care



 Taught by Harvard Medical School f
